summary: Anonymous user Free Game of the Day - Feed Select
description:
GIVEN a user is anonymous
AND a Free Game of the Day is scheduled/in-progress out-of-market

steps.action: WHEN the user selects the game tile for a Free Game of the Day
steps.result:
THEN the following text displays at the top of the modal "Free Game of the Day", "Login or register with a free MLB account to watch the free game of the day."
AND text "Full Game Access" displays above a [Subscribe] button
AND the user is navigated to the Subscriptions/Paywall page if they select the [Subscribe] button
AND the user is navigated back to the Games page after pressing the "BACK" button on the controller
